items.briefing:
There are no major cyber threats or incidents directly targeting Australian organisations or individuals in today's articles. On the industry side, Rubrik and MEDITECH have partnered to strengthen cyber resilience in hospitals, which is relevant for anyone working in or with healthcare organisations. OVHcloud has also launched a new APAC data centre zone, which may interest teams considering local data storage options.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation handles sensitive data (such as health records), check that your backup and recovery processes are regularly tested — a data breach can happen at any time, and knowing your recovery steps in advance makes a significant difference.

featured.title: Too Big to Fail – Hyperscale Data Centres Bring New Infrastructure Security Imperatives to Australia
featured.quote: Australia's hyperscale data centres create critical national security infrastructure vulnerabilities.
